Table 25b: Components of Total Leverage: (in millions)
On-balance sheet exposures
On-balance sheet assets (excl. derivatives and repo-style, incl. collateral)
Less: amounts deducted from Tier 1 capital
Total adjusted on-balance sheet exposures
Derivative exposures
Replacement cost for derivative exposures (net of cash variation margin)
Add-on amounts for PFE for derivative exposures
Gross-up for cash collateral posted if deducted from on-balance sheet assets
Less: Deductions of receivable assets for cash variation margin posted
Less: Exempted CCP leg of client-cleared transactions
Effective notional principal amount of sold credit protection
Less: Effective notional principal amount offsets and PFE adjustments for sold credit protection
Total derivative exposures
Repo-style transactions
On-balance sheet assets for repo-style transactions
Less: Reduction of gross value of receivables in reverse repo by cash payables in repo under netting
Counterparty credit risk for all repo-style transactions
Exposure amount for repo-style transactions where bank acts as agent
Total repo-style transactions
Other off-balance sheet exposures
Off-balance sheet exposures at gross notional amounts
Less: Adjustments for conversion to credit equivalent amounts
Total Other off-balance sheet exposures
Total leverage exposure
